rubric.en:
**G1** (1p): Organize your project in 10 files: main.cpp, Procesor.h, Sentence.h, Sentence.cpp, ComputeVowals.h, ComputeVowals.cpp, CountLetter.h, CountLetter.cpp, LongestWord.h, and LongestWord.cpp
**G2** (3p): Organize the file Sentence.h to correctly implement the UML diagram (two data members, one operator, one constructor, 3r methods).
**G3** (2p): Implementation of the method Sentence::RunAll
**G4** (2p): Implementation of the method Sentence::ListAll
**G6** (9p): Correctly implement all the virtual methods in classes ComputeVowals, CountLetter, and LongestWord. (3p for each class - 1p (GetName), 2p (Compute))
**G6*** (2p): Implementation of the operator from class Sentence
**G7** (4p): Implementation of the method Sentence::Run
**G8** (4p): Implementation of the constructors for Sentence, ComputeVowals, CountLetter, and LongestWord (1p for each class)
**G9** (3p): The program compiles and upon execution produces the expected results
rubric.ro:
**G1** (1p): Organize your project in 10 files: main.cpp, Procesor.h, Sentence.h, Sentence.cpp, ComputeVowals.h, ComputeVowals.cpp, CountLetter.h, CountLetter.cpp, LongestWord.h, and LongestWord.cpp
**G2** (3p): Organize the file Sentence.h to correctly implement the UML diagram (two data members, one operator, one constructor, 3r methods).
**G3** (2p): Implementation of the method Sentence::RunAll
**G4** (2p): Implementation of the method Sentence::ListAll
**G6** (9p): Correctly implement all the virtual methods in classes ComputeVowals, CountLetter, and LongestWord. (3p for each class - 1p (GetName), 2p (Compute))
**G6*** (2p): Implementation of the operator from class Sentence
**G7** (4p): Implementation of the method Sentence::Run
**G8** (4p): Implementation of the constructors for Sentence, ComputeVowals, CountLetter, and LongestWord (1p for each class)
**G9** (3p): The program compiles and upon execution produces the expected results
